title: Fast Local Feedback, Hooks, and Developer Experience · Failure Case: Hook Bypass
summary: Create fast local gates that match CI without blocking ordinary iteration. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates hook bypass increment in a one-command local verification workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Treat local hooks as convenience while CI remains authoritative and bypasses stay visible.
Run fast deterministic changed-file checks in local hooks and keep heavier checks elsewhere.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
